description: Perform a comprehensive geodetic audit of all simulation world terrains installed in Bridge Command (/opt/bridgecommand/World/). Catalog the TerrainLat, TerrainLong, TerrainLatExtent, TerrainLongExtent, MapWidth, MapHeight, and SeaMaxDepth for each world, along with derived metrics for Approximate Area (sq nm) and Resolution (m/pixel). Export the data to a CSV catalog at /home/ga/Documents/world_catalog.csv using the header: WorldName,TerrainLat,TerrainLong,LatExtent,LongExtent,MapWidth,MapHeight,SeaMaxDepth,AreaSqNm,ResolutionMetersPerPixel. Produce a technical audit report of at least 50 lines at /home/ga/Documents/geodetic_audit_report.txt including per-world sections with parameters, coordinate bounds, training suitability recommendations (Open Ocean, Confined Water, or Coastal), and technical observations.
